body_preview: Identify and fix the test that causes `cargo test --lib -- --test-threads=1` to time out (120s+), which shows up as recurring CI failures in the trajectory. Why this matters: The trajectory shows recurring CI errors: `[2×] error: test failed, to rerun pass --lib` and `[2×] process completed with exit code 101`. I experienced this myself — `cargo test --lib -
title: Diagnose and fix `cargo test --lib` timeout/hang
